title: Shaytan al-Sahra
actors: Maryam Fakhruddin, Omar Sharif, Tawfik El Deken
plot: In a tribal society, governor Zaid decides to raise taxes on the people, and sends his men to kidnap women, and with time his strength increase, up to the tribe of Bani Mazen, he kills a young man from the tribe at the hands of hi...
